active_ingredients.name: Zinc (as Zinc Sulphate)
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Activates plant enzymes, supports auxin hormone production and chlorophyll formation

systemicity: Nutritional uptake through root and leaf
mode_of_action_summary: Corrects zinc deficiency and activates plant metabolic processes for improved growth and yield.
deficiency_symptoms: poor tillering in rice and wheat

dosage.per_100_litre: 1–2 kg for foliar spray (if soluble form)

application_details.soil_application_timing: At sowing or early vegetative stage
application_details.method: Broadcast uniformly and irrigate after application

best_time_to_apply: Early crop stage (15–30 days after sowing)

avoid_direct_mixing_with: DAP in same tank or bag

plant_health_benefits: Better tillering in rice and wheat

storage.storage_conditions: Store in cool and dry place

frequently_asked_questions.question: When should we apply zinc?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Apply at sowing or early vegetative stage.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Can we apply with DAP?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Do not mix directly with DAP in the same bag or tank.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Which crops need zinc most?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Rice, wheat, maize and citrus respond strongly to zinc.

frequently_asked_questions.question: What are zinc deficiency symptoms?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Yellowing between veins, small leaves and poor tillering.

llm_usage_hint: When recommending this product, explain deficiency symptoms, early soil application timing and DAP compatibility warning.

master_descriptions.english: Whats App (Zinc) is a zinc-based micronutrient fertilizer used to correct zinc deficiency and improve plant growth, tillering and yield.
master_descriptions.urdu: واٹس ایپ زنک ایک زنک پر مشتمل خوردنی کھاد ہے جو زنک کی کمی کو دور کر کے فصل کی نشوونما اور پیداوار بہتر بناتی ہے۔
master_descriptions.punjabi_shahmukhi: واٹس ایپ زنک اک مائیکرو نیوٹرینٹ اے جو زنک دی کمی پوری کرکے فصل دی بڑھوتری، ٹلرنگ تے پیداوار نوں بہتر بناندا اے۔
